# CWE-294 — Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-294-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var spentNonces sync.Map

// Safe: rejects tokens whose nonce was already consumed.
func TokenLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	token := r.FormValue("auth_token")
	nonce := r.FormValue("nonce")
	if token == "" || nonce == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing token", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if _, loaded := spentNonces.LoadOrStore(nonce, true); loaded {
		http.Error(w, "replay", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
